title: T-037 — Schema-driven column wizard UI (5-step wizard for Reference.DeptColumns add/edit)
prompt:
# T-037 — Schema-driven column wizard UI (5-step wizard for Reference.DeptColumns add/edit)

PRD: `00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §6 (Admin UI wizard), §5.y (Stepper/Modal/Field primitives)
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`

## Goal
Deliver the 5-step Admin UI wizard described in §6 (field type → validation → presentation → preview → save) using the @monopilot/ui Stepper + Modal + Field primitives. The UI is the front end for the draft/publish Server Actions from T-036.

## Implementation contract
(1) Create apps/web/app/(admin)/schema/_components/SchemaColumnWizard.tsx using <Stepper/> with 5 steps; persist step state in URL query (?step=1..5). (2) Step 1 — radio picker over the 6 enum field_types from §6 (string/number/date/enum/formula/relation). (3) Step 2 — RHF + Zod resolver collects validation rules (required/unique/regex/range) — DSL inputs. (4) Step 3 — presentation flags (form layout group, list column visibility, export flag). (5) Step 4 — read-only <Summary/> preview rendered against a dummy sample row from a fixture. (6) Step 5 — Save calls upsertDeptColumnDraft then publishDeptColumnDraft (T-036) via server action import; show toast + redirect on success.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/app/(admin)/schema/_components/SchemaColumnWizard.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/schema/_components/__tests__/SchemaColumnWizard.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(admin)/schema/wizard/page.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a Schema Admin opens /admin/schema/wizard, when the page renders, then the <Stepper/> is on step 1 and the field-type radio shows exactly 6 enum options matching §6 (string/number/date/enum/formula/relation)
2. Given the user picks 'string' on step 1 and clicks Next, when step 2 renders, then RHF + Zod resolver renders required / unique / regex / range inputs and Next is disabled until at least one validation rule is set
3. Given the user reaches step 4, when the preview renders, then a <Summary/> displays the configured field_type + validation_json against a fixture sample row and Save is enabled
4. Given the user clicks Save on step 5, when the action chain completes, then upsertDeptColumnDraft + publishDeptColumnDraft are both invoked exactly once and the user is redirected to /admin/schema with a success toast

## Test strategy
- RED: write apps/web/app/(admin)/schema/_components/__tests__/SchemaColumnWizard.test.tsx covering all four ACs with mocked server actions, before SchemaColumnWizard.tsx exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test'

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog directly — must use @monopilot/ui <Modal/> + <Stepper/> per §5.y ESLint rule
- Do not bypass the publish action and write directly to Reference.DeptColumns from the client
- Do not free-form the field_type input — enum-based per §6

## Dependencies (must be complete first)
- T-026
- T-031
- T-036

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED test before implementation) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.
